title: erythrococca dewevrei
intro: Erythrococca dewevrei, also known as the red-stemmed erythrococca, is a plant species native to tropical Africa. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Erythrococca dewevrei include reducing fever, relieving pain and swelling, and supporting wound healing due to its antimicrobial properties. Erythrococca dewevrei can be prepared as a decoction or infusion for use in herbal remedies, and its leaves and stems are often used in traditional African medicine.
